NVIDIA GTC
Catch the keynote replay, unveiling advances across AI infrastructure powering AI factories, agentic AI systems, physical AI and robotics, and a new generation of AI-native personal computing.
Artificial Intelligence
A new beginning.
Data Center
NVIDIA today announced that the world’s technology leaders are adopting NVIDIA Vera, the first CPU purpose-built for agentic AI.
Artificial Intelligence
The world’s most powerful deskside AI supercomputer with Windows, built on the NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Desktop Superchip.
Data Center
NVIDIA Vera Rubin is ramping into full production, fueling AI labs, cloud providers, and hyperscalers to build tomorrow’s intelligence.
Robotics
The first humanoid robot reference design built on NVIDIA Isaac GR00T gives researchers a faster path from setup to deployment.
NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang Keynote at GTC Taipei
Introducing NVIDIA RTX Spark
NVIDIA Launches Vera, the CPU Built to Run the World’s AI Agents
Announcing NVIDIA DGX Station for Windows
NVIDIA Vera Rubin Powers Agentic AI Factories Worldwide
NVIDIA and Unitree Announce H2 Plus to Advance Humanoid Research
See CEO Jensen Huang's keynote on the new era of inference, AI factories, open source, physical AI, robotics, and more. Watch Replay

AI is powering change in every industry. From generative AI and speech recognition to medical imaging and improved supply chain management, AI is providing enterprises that compute power, tools, and algorithms their teams need to do their life's work.
New NVIDIA AI for Media technologies offer real-time building blocks for live production.
New OmniModel for robots, autonomous vehicles, and vision AI agents wins leaderboards.
Artificial Intelligence | Announcement
NVIDIA Cosmos 3 OmniModel— reasoning, simulation, and action generation in one.
From engineering to healthcare, companies gain always-on AI coworkers with NVIDIA’s open stack.
Omni-reasoning across video, audio, image, and text for lower-cost enterprise agentic systems.
NVIDIA launches the first open source AI model family to accelerate useful quantum computers.
NVIDIA and T-Mobile work with Nokia to turn 5G into distributed edge AI computers, enabling devices to see, hear, and act in real time.
New open models power AI agents, physical AI for robotics, and healthcare research.

The NVIDIA NemoClaw plugin for OpenClaw and NVIDIA Nemotron 3 open models unlock new agentic AI tools and workflows that enable fast, private local assistants—making them faster, safer, and easier to build on NVIDIA RTX PCs and DGX Spark.

NVIDIA accelerated computing, libraries and AI models enable software makers and industry manufacturers to develop products for large-scale, physically accurate simulations and interactive digital twins so teams can efficiently build, train, and test advanced systems before deployment, bringing products to market faster.
Rockwell Automation
Secure, specialized agents compress weeks of simulation work into hours.
TSMC is using NVIDIA accelerated computing and AI to advance semiconductor design and manufacturing.

Nicolas Cerisier, VP of 3DEXPERIENCE Platform R&D at Dassault Systèmes, explains how industrial world models go beyond pattern recognition to embed the actual laws of physics, chemistry, and engineering.
Sovereign AI infrastructure, AI physics, agents, and robotics are powering industrial innovation.
Siemens, Accenture, KION, GXO
The next era of industrial AI and software-defined manufacturing has arrived. NVIDIA and our partners will explore the latest breakthroughs in industrial AI.
Industrial software giants are bringing NVIDIA CUDA-X™, Omniverse™, and GPU-accelerated industrial software and tools to their customers.
Explore sessions for developers, technical practitioners, and business leaders in the industrial and manufacturing sectors.
The partnership combines Dassault Systèmes and NVIDIA technologies to transform industries.
Siemens and NVIDIA will bring industrial and physical AI to every industry and industrial workflow.
The Learn OpenUSD curriculum is now open source, empowering you to tailor world-class training content for your community.

High-performance computing (HPC) is the ability to process data and perform complex calculations at high speeds. HPC is one of the most essential tools fueling the advancement of computational science.
Industry adoptions from Applied Materials, Samsung, Synopsys, and TSMC.
The first fully open, production-ready weather AI stack makes weather AI accessible worldwide.
DCAI
NVIDIA CUDA-Q running on the Gefion supercomputer enables new engineering applications for quantum computing.
NVIDIA accelerates workloads spanning quantum computing research.
Research Centre Jülich / Sascha Kreklau
NVIDIA Grace Hopper platform boosts simulation and training on the Jülich JUPITER supercomputer.
Hewlett Packard Enterprise
Vera Rubin is built to change how science gets done—in real time and at massive scale.
This first-of-its-kind generative AI model is set to transform climate modeling and analytics.
A new system to help scientists tackle fusion, astronomy, and our understanding of life itself.
The new center will advance the development of quantum computing architectures and algorithms.

NVIDIA RTX™ powers the world’s fastest PCs and the ultimate platform for gamers and creators. Enjoy beautiful ray tracing, AI-powered DLSS, and much more in games and applications, on your desktop, laptop, in the cloud, or in your living room.
The fusion of NVIDIA AI and RTX graphics in a single chip, powering a new beginning of Windows PCs.
NVIDIA DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction, over 1,000 RTX-enhanced games and apps, 11 new DLSS 4.5 games and much more.
Powering today's hits, and introducing enhanced Ray Reconstruction.
Get the ultimate upgrade with GeForce RTX
Accelerating performance in your favorite games. Check out the latest titles.
NVIDIA DLSS 4.5 Available now.
License to unlock: Your 007 First Light Daring Elite Outfit*.
*Terms and conditions Apply. You must own a copy of the game to access the outfit.

GeForce RTX 50 Series GPUs bring game-changing AI capabilities to gamers and creators. Multiply performance with NVIDIA DLSS 4, generate images at unprecedented speed, and unleash your creativity with NVIDIA Studio.
Kick off the summer with 10 games this week, including the highly requested surreal open-world adventure, ‘Neverness to Everness.’

The NVIDIA NemoClaw plugin for OpenClaw and NVIDIA Nemotron 3 open models unlock new agentic AI tools and workflows that enable fast, private local assistants—making them faster, safer, and easier to build on NVIDIA RTX PCs and DGX Spark.

From developing autonomous vehicles on NVIDIA DRIVE® to creating factory digital twins and retail experiences with NVIDIA Omniverse, our automotive solutions offer the performance and scalability to design, visualize, simulate, and create all types of future transportation.
Automotive industry leaders are bringing Level 4-ready fleets to market on the DRIVE Hyperion platform.
Alpamayo 2 Super is a 32 billion-parameter reasoning VLA model, built for Level 4 robotaxi-ready autonomous vehicles.
BYD, Geely, Hyundai Motor Group, Isuzu, Kodiak, Nissan, and Volkswagen build on the NVIDIA AV platform.
The ​​NVIDIA DRIVE AV software platform and NVIDIA Halos architecture contributed to the CLA’s top safety rating.
Built on the NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion and DRIVE AV, the new S-Class delivers safety first autonomy.
Level 2++ will enter U.S. production with NVIDIA’s full-stack software across the automaker’s lineup.
Partners build on the NVIDIA Level 4, robotaxi-ready platform to advance safe autonomous mobility.
New NVIDIA open datasets, safety frameworks, and technologies are advancing how developers build safe physical AI.
Lucid
Learn how NVIDIA and partners like Mercedes‑Benz, Lucid, Volvo & XPENG are building AI‑defined cars.
See how generative AI, digital twins, and industrial AI are transforming the automotive industry.

The NVIDIA Jetson™ and Isaac™ platforms provide end-to-end solutions to develop and deploy AI-powered autonomous machines and edge computing applications across manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, smart cities, and retail.
JetPack 7.2, NemoClaw make Jetson agentic-ready for robotics, healthcare, industrial automation.
NVIDIA IGX Thor powers real-time physical AI at the industrial edge, enabling autonomous machines with advanced sensing, reasoning and functional safety..
Discover sessions on how AI, simulation, and accelerated computing are enabling robots to see, learn, and make decisions in real time.
Explore how edge AI and accelerated computing are delivering real-time intelligence to autonomous machines and smart infrastructure across industries..
Caterpillar
Caterpillar is integrating NVIDIA technologies, from NVIDIA Jetson Thor to speech models, to transform the world’s heavy industries.
Celebrate the holidays with the perfect gift for your robot: an NVIDIA Jetson™ AI robotics computer.
See how dexterity workflows and AI models address challenges like adaptability and data scarcity.
The new NVIDIA® Jetson Thor™ Developer Kit and module are now available.
Amazon Devices and Services
The company’s innovative manufacturing solution powers robotic arms to autonomously audit devices using NVIDIA technologies.

From the cloud to the office to the data center to the edge, NVIDIA provides solutions that deliver breakthrough performance on enterprise AI and HPC workloads at any scale, driving business decisions in real time and resulting in faster time to value.
The partnership brings agentic AI to every developer, from Windows to Azure and local deployments.
NVIDIA DOCA delivers 1,000x faster threat detection and zero-trust file access for agentic AI.
Lower token cost and accelerate deployment with reference designs, digital twins, and software.
Multipath Reliable Connection (MRC): Proven on NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet, now open to industry.
Delivering high performance and energy for AI training and agentic inference at scale.
Reference architecture to enable storage providers to build next-gen infrastructure for agentic AI.
This compact GPU delivers power-efficient performance for every enterprise.
Data-center-class performance and edge AI on orbit for geospatial intelligence with NVIDIA Vera Rubin Space Module, IGX Thor, and Jetson Orin.
The new reference design provides a guide for building codesigned AI infrastructure that delivers maximum token per watt and accelerated time to first production.
NVIDIA® BlueField®-powered acceleration solutions are now part of the AI Factory validated design.
NVIDIA pioneered accelerated computing to tackle challenges no one else can solve. Our work in AI and digital twins is transforming the world's largest industries and profoundly impacting society.

Join Jensen Huang live at SAP Center for the GTC 2026 keynote and see where AI goes next. It all starts here.
Join NVIDIA GTC 2026—the premier AI event where developers, researchers, and business leaders converge to explore the next wave of AI innovation.
AI is one of the most powerful forces shaping the world today. It isn't a clever app or a single model; it's essential infrastructure, like electricity and the internet.
NVIDIA’s CEO will take the stage to explore the latest in AI.
Watch the replay of NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC Paris keynote at VivaTech.
See how tokens transform data into intelligence, power AI models, scale inference, and drive next-gen systems that predict, generate, and adapt.
NVIDIA is the result of the decades-long pursuit of a vision and the life’s work of our employees. Discover our company’s story.
Accuray
Our work is truly unique. Part science. Part art. Every breakthrough helps shape what’s next.
Learn how companies, from finance to manufacturing and beyond, are on the way to sustainable AI with NVIDIA technologies.

SMS was acquired by NVIDIA Corporation of Santa Clara, CA in May 2022 and was dissolved as a separate corporate entity. NVIDIA is incorporating SMS technology into its Omniverse platform and OpenUSD. For legacy support content please refer to the following: SMLib and NLib .

Deci was acquired by NVIDIA Corporation of Santa Clara, CA in May 2024 and was dissolved as a separate corporate entity. For legacy support content please refer to the following: Deci AI Documentation
